seoDescription: Learn how GenFix handles personal information, communications, and data security obligations.

hero.heading: Privacy Policy
hero.body: This page explains how GenFix collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information for sales, support, and service delivery activities.

sections.title: How GenFix Handles Personal Information
sections.body: We collect and process personal information only where required to provide quotes, deliver services, and support customer communication.

cards.title: Information We Collect
cards.description: Typical data includes contact details, business information, project scope, and communication records.

cards.title: Why We Collect It
cards.description: Data is used to prepare proposals, coordinate service delivery, and provide ongoing client support.

cards.title: How Data Is Protected
cards.description: Access controls and internal process safeguards are applied to reduce unauthorized use or disclosure.

sections.title: Your Privacy Choices
sections.body: You can contact GenFix to request access, correction, communication preference updates, or privacy complaint handling.

cards.title: Access And Correction Requests
cards.description: Request a copy of personal information we hold and ask for corrections where needed.

cards.title: Marketing Preferences
cards.description: Opt out of promotional communications or update preferred contact channels at any time.

cards.title: Complaints And Escalation
cards.description: Raise concerns directly with GenFix and we will follow a documented complaint handling process.
